name: HRC_MESSAGE_ACTIONS_VL
query: SELECT HMAB.ACTION_ID ACTION_ID, HMAB.CONFIG_ID CONFIG_ID, HMAB.IS_AFFIRMATIVE_ACTION, HMAB.ACTION_CODE ACTION_CODE, HMAB.IS_ACTIVE IS_ACTIVE, HMAB.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, HMAB.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, HMAB.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HMAB.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HMAB.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HMAB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HMAB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HMAB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HMATL.NAME NAME, HMATL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION FROM HRC_MESSAGE_ACTIONS_B HMAB, HRC_MESSAGE_ACTIONS_TL HMATL WHERE HMAB.ACTION_ID = HMATL.ACTION_ID AND HMATL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
